commits.message: feat(recording): enhance V10 report with token tracking and modal display
fix: remove broken bug_reporter_hook with missing dependencies

v10_improvements: Timestamp filtering for accurate session-only token counts
Timezone conversion (local → UTC) for transcript filtering
Token columns in timeline table (In, Out, C-R, C-W)
Modal overlay for full-width prompt/response display
UTF-8 error handling for transcript files
bug_fixes: Removed broken bug_reporter_hook.py with missing dependencies
Cleaned up hooks.json to prevent ModuleNotFoundError spam

active_recording.note: Recording will stop after restart - that's expected

immediate: Restart Claude Code to reload hooks.json (fix bug_reporter_hook errors)
Run commands that launch sub-agents to test V10 token tracking
test_commands: /popkit-core:record stop - Stop and generate V10 report
validation_goals: Token columns (In, Out, C-R, C-W) show actual numbers
Modal overlay displays long prompts/responses correctly
Session tokens only count recording window (not entire transcript)
No more bug_reporter_hook errors in stderr

context.recording_system: PopKit session recording with V10 HTML reports

benchmarking.description: Compare PopKit vs Vanilla Claude for same tasks
benchmarking.ready_when: V10 token tracking validated with real sub-agent launches
